use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF MILD-TO-MODERATE CORONAVIRUS DISEASE 2019 (COVID-19) IN ADULTS WHO ARE AT HIGH RISK FOR PROGRESSION TO SEVERE COVID-19, INCLUDING HOSPITALIZATION OR DEATH
